svg.title: End-to-End Machine Learning Workflow
svg.desc: A visual diagram showing the full ML lifecycle from data ingestion through deployment, with cross-functional collaboration at the center.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about data ingestion and preprocessing in ML')
sendPrompt('Explain feature engineering and preprocessing pipelines')
sendPrompt('What does exploratory data analysis involve?')
sendPrompt('How are large-scale datasets handled in ML?')
sendPrompt('What NLP techniques are used in ML pipelines?')
sendPrompt('How are predictive analytics models built?')
sendPrompt('What metrics and methods are used to evaluate ML models?')
sendPrompt('How do you balance accuracy, interpretability and compute cost in ML?')
sendPrompt('How does a data scientist collaborate with engineering and product teams?')
g.text: Data science · Engineering · Product — fast-paced iteration

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does production deployment of ML models involve?')
sendPrompt('How do you monitor and improve model performance over time?')
sendPrompt('How do you translate ML results for non-technical stakeholders?')
sendPrompt('How does ML deliver measurable business impact?')
